mapper.sql: select d.*, cu.customer_name, u1.user_name as initiator_name, u2.user_name as target_user_name, u3.user_name as handler_name from crm_customer_dispute d left join crm_customer cu on d.customer_id = cu.customer_id left join sys_user u1 on d.initiator_user_id = u1.user_id left join sys_user u2 on d.target_user_id = u2.user_id left join sys_user u3 on d.handler_id = u3.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into crm_customer_dispute ( customer_id, initiator_user_id, target_user_id, reason, status, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{customerId}, #{initiatorUserId}, #{targetUserId}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update crm_customer_dispute set status = '3', update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId} and status = '0'
